title: [Calyx] [Cleanup] Share common functions/naming between `Component` and `CellInterface` port access.
body:
After #1762 is merged, we should look into reducing code duplication between the port access function of `ComponentOp`s and `CellInterface`s. We should also provide similar function names and remove any functions that aren't used yet, since they're not really tested.

One option would be providing an interface for everything that has a set of ports, but I think this is overkill. I think any complex functions can just share the same code via declarations (e.g. filtering out certain types of ports using `PortInfo`), and the rest will share names.
